text: {"candidates": [{"index": 0, "question": "Calculate the return on investment for a gain of 1017 on an investment of 7766. Then take that percentage and divide it by 24. Finally, clamp the resulting number so it stays between 57 and 131."}, {"index": 1, "question": "Find the profit margin when revenue is 4803 and cost is 793. Then take the reciprocal of that margin percentage. Finally, divide that reciprocal value by 20."}, {"index": 2, "question": "Convert an hourly wage of 49 dollars, for 30 hours a week, to an annual salary. Finally, add a 7% sales tax to that net price."}, {"index": 3, "question": "First, round 628.79 to the nearest whole number. Then find the absolute difference between that result and 42. candidates.question: Calculate the return on investment for a gain of 1017 on an investment of 7766. Then take that percentage and divide it by 24. Finally, clamp the resulting number so it stays between 57 and 131.
Find the profit margin when revenue is 4803 and cost is 793. Then take the reciprocal of that margin percentage. Finally, divide that reciprocal value by 20.

Convert an hourly wage of 49 dollars, for 30 hours a week, to an annual salary. Then remove the 21% sales tax included in that amount to find the net price. Finally, add a 7% sales tax to that net price.
First, round 628.79 to the nearest whole number. Then find the absolute difference between that result and 42. Finally, find the absolute difference between that new result and 299.
Get a temperature report for 4 degrees Celsius. Then multiply that report value by 28. Finally, determine how many whole times 6 fits into the resulting product.
